description: Issue tracking, kanban boards, wikis, and team chat/collaboration tools.

entries.name: Jira
entries.summary: Atlassian's issue tracking and agile project management tool, the de facto standard at many software companies.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 10 users with core features.

entries.name: Trello
entries.summary: Simple kanban-style board tool for personal and small-team task management.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited cards, up to 10 boards per workspace free.

entries.name: Linear
entries.summary: Fast, keyboard-driven issue tracking and project management built for software teams.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 250 issues with core features for small teams.

entries.name: Notion
entries.summary: All-in-one workspace combining docs, wikis, databases, and project tracking.
entries.freeTier: Free for individuals with unlimited blocks; limited file uploads and collaborators on team free plan.

entries.name: ClickUp
entries.summary: Highly customizable project management platform combining tasks, docs, goals, and whiteboards.
entries.freeTier: Free Forever plan with unlimited users and tasks, limited storage.

entries.name: Huly
entries.summary: All-in-one open-source project management platform (Linear/Jira/Slack/Notion alternative) with chat and video built in.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited users, 10GB storage/workspace, 10GB video/audio traffic free.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans add higher storage and SSO.

entries.name: Slack
entries.summary: Team chat and collaboration hub with channels, threads, and a vast app/integration ecosystem.
entries.freeTier: 90-day searchable message history, unlimited integrations, free for small teams.

entries.name: Discord
entries.summary: Voice, video, and text chat platform, widely adopted by dev communities and open-source projects.
entries.freeTier: Free for unlimited servers, messages, and voice/video, with no message history limit.
entries.paidFrom: Nitro subscription adds cosmetic/upload perks, not required for core use.

entries.name: Gitter
entries.summary: Chat tool built for GitHub projects and open-source communities.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public/private rooms, free for teams up to 25.

entries.name: HackMD
entries.summary: Real-time collaborative markdown editing, like Google Docs but for markdown notes and docs.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited notes free; collaborator count limited on private notes/templates.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan from $5/month for more collaborators.

entries.name: GoKanban.io
entries.summary: Syntax-based, no-registration kanban board for quick personal task tracking.
entries.freeTier: Completely free, no account required, no limitations.

entries.name: HeySpace
entries.summary: Task management with integrated chat, calendar, timeline view, and video calls.
